/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Os -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libns3.45-antenna-test-default.so -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-antenna-test-default.so "CMakeFiles/antenna-test.dir/test/test-circular-aperture-antenna.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/antenna-test.dir/test/test-angles.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/antenna-test.dir/test/test-cosine-antenna.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/antenna-test.dir/test/test-degrees-radians.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/antenna-test.dir/test/test-isotropic-antenna.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/antenna-test.dir/test/test-parabolic-antenna.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/antenna-test.dir/test/test-uniform-planar-array.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/antenna-test.dir/test/test-adjacency-matrix.cc.o"   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-antenna-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed
